methodsAttempted.query: ETH Zurich AI generative AI policy official site:ethz.ch
methodsAttempted.notes: Web search provider unavailable (Gemini API 403). Fell back to direct URL guessing.
ethz.ch/sitemap.xml returned 404. Site uses AEM with login-gated content structure.
Tried 8 paths. educational-development-and-technology and education pages (200) returned content. Other paths 404.
EDT department page contained link to the ai-in-education page which was the main AI policy hub.
From the ai-in-education page discovered links to academic-integrity, tools, and other sub-pages, plus the Guidelines PDF and reference to aiethicspolicy.ethz.ch.

summary: ETH Zurich has a well-structured AI in education hub under /en/the-eth-zurich/education/ai-in-education/. Found 5 verified source candidates: main GenAI guidance page, academic integrity page, tools/licenses page, formal guidelines PDF, and AI ethics policy network. All accessible via standard HTTP. Discovery path: path_expansion → subdomain_expansion → link_traversal.
